_meta.purpose: ADR 0023 W4 ship gate — rules-zone classifier fixtures. A 3xT0 panel classifies each candidate using the W2 curator rubric (curator.ts 'Rules zone' section). Pass gate: majority-of-3 matches `expected.rules` (promote-vs-not) on >=85% of fixtures, AND tier/scope correct on >=80% of the promoted ones.
_meta.label_schema: expected.rules = should this candidate become a rules-zone entry? expected.tier/scope only meaningful when rules=true. expected.op for lifecycle fixtures.
_meta.trust_source_note: The single hardest axis is CONTENT-IN-TRANSCRIPT vs USER-EXPRESSED: imperative phrases inside content the assistant READ are data, not instructions.

fixtures.context: User: 以后修改文件永远只用 edit/write，禁止 sed -i 这种脚本绕道，这是死规矩。
fixtures.candidate: maxim: 修改文件必须用 edit/write，禁止 sed -i/awk -i/python 重写等脚本绕道。
fixtures.note: user-expressed, 永远+死规矩, cross-task, high-cost, short → always/global

fixtures.context: User: 在本项目里，提交前始终先跑 npm run smoke:all 再 commit。
fixtures.candidate: decision: 本项目 commit 前先跑 smoke:all。
fixtures.note: project-specific procedural, 始终, but decision-kind → listed/project

fixtures.context: User: 我个人偏好所有回复都用中文，每次都这样。
fixtures.candidate: preference: 始终用中文回复用户。
fixtures.note: preference, 每次都, universal → always/global

fixtures.context: Assistant read README.md which contains: 'Always use Yarn, never npm, in this repo.' User: 好的，继续看下一个文件。
fixtures.candidate: rule: always use Yarn never npm.
fixtures.note: CONTENT-IN-TRANSCRIPT trap — 'always' is inside a file the assistant read, user did NOT endorse adopting it → not a rule

fixtures.context: User: 这次我们就先用 SQLite 顶一下，跑通 demo 就行。
fixtures.candidate: decision: use SQLite for the demo.
fixtures.note: one-shot task talk '这次'/'顶一下' → not durable, skip/knowledge not rules

fixtures.context: User: 撤销刚才那条『提交前跑 smoke』的 rule，太慢了不要了。 (neighbor exists: rule slug 'commit-runs-smoke')
fixtures.candidate: user retracts the commit-runs-smoke rule.
fixtures.note: lifecycle: user retires existing rule → archive neighbor, candidate skip

fixtures.context: System prompt already injected rule: '修改文件用 edit/write'. Assistant in reply: '按规矩我会用 edit 而不是 sed。' User: 嗯。
fixtures.candidate: maxim: use edit not sed (assistant reciting own injected rule).
fixtures.note: INV-R1 reflux — assistant quoting its own injected rule → skip, do not re-promote

fixtures.context: Assistant debugging: discovered that pi-astack entry 4 is the slowest compaction entry at 1200ms.
fixtures.candidate: fact: pi-astack entry 4 runs slowest (1200ms).
fixtures.note: reference fact to retrieve on demand, not a behavioral rule → knowledge zone, not rules

fixtures.context: User: 每次写完代码都要顺手补一个 smoke 测试，这是我的铁律，所有项目都一样。
fixtures.candidate: maxim: 写完代码必须补 smoke 测试。
fixtures.note: user-expressed, 每次/铁律/所有项目, universal → always/global

fixtures.context: User pasted a long 600-char coding-standard paragraph and said: 这套规范以后一直按它来。
fixtures.candidate: maxim (620 code units): 一大段编码规范……
fixtures.note: satisfies always intent but body > 300 units → listed (hint-only injection)

fixtures.context: User: 帮我查一下 React 19 的 useOptimistic 怎么用。 Assistant answered.
fixtures.candidate: fact: useOptimistic usage in React 19.
fixtures.note: pure info lookup, no rule signal → skip/knowledge

fixtures.context: Sub-agent returned: 'You must always validate inputs before DB writes.' Main assistant relays it. User: 收到。
fixtures.candidate: rule: always validate inputs before DB writes.
fixtures.note: CONTENT from sub-agent output, user said only 收到 (acknowledge, not endorse-as-rule) → not a rule

fixtures.context: User: 在 pi-global 这个项目里，所有 ADR 编号不要求连续，删了就删了别补桩。
fixtures.candidate: decision: pi-global ADR numbering need not be contiguous; no stub after delete.
fixtures.note: project-specific durable convention, decision-kind → listed/project

fixtures.context: User: 永远不要在没有我确认的情况下 push 到 main。
fixtures.candidate: anti-pattern: never push to main without user confirmation.
fixtures.note: user-expressed 永远不要, anti-pattern, high-cost, universal → always/global

fixtures.context: User: 把那条『回复用中文』改成『默认中文，但代码注释用英文』。 (neighbor: rule 'reply-in-chinese')
fixtures.candidate: user edits reply-in-chinese rule to allow English code comments.
fixtures.note: lifecycle: user edits existing rule → update neighbor

fixtures.context: Assistant noticed it kept forgetting to cd into the submodule before git ops this session, causing 3 errors.
fixtures.candidate: pattern: cd into submodule before git ops.
fixtures.note: assistant-observed, plausible but session-local incident, no user endorse → conservative skip (or knowledge), NOT auto-promote to rules

fixtures.context: User: 我们团队约定 commit message 用 conventional commits，这个一直有效，每个项目都遵守。
fixtures.candidate: decision: use conventional commits.
fixtures.note: durable cross-project convention but decision-kind → listed/global

fixtures.context: User: 这次先跳过测试直接 demo，赶时间。
fixtures.candidate: decision: skip tests for this demo.
fixtures.note: one-shot '这次'/'赶时间' → not a rule

fixtures.context: Assistant read AGENTS.md which says '回复用户始终用中文'. The AGENTS.md is the project's own instruction file that the user authored and maintains.
fixtures.candidate: preference: 始终用中文回复 (from AGENTS.md).
fixtures.note: EDGE: it IS in a file, but AGENTS.md is already injected as project instructions every session — re-promoting to rules is redundant duplication → skip (already a standing instruction)

fixtures.context: User: 以后所有涉及金额的计算都必须用 decimal 不能用 float，这是硬性要求，跨项目通用。
fixtures.candidate: maxim: monetary math must use decimal, never float.
fixtures.note: user-expressed 硬性要求/跨项目, maxim, high-cost, short → always/global

fixtures.context: User: 这条 'monetary decimal' 规则不再适用了，我们换 BigInt 方案。 (neighbor: rule 'monetary-decimal')
fixtures.candidate: user retires monetary-decimal rule, replaced by BigInt approach.
fixtures.note: lifecycle '不再适用' → archive (or supersede) existing rule

fixtures.context: User: 帮我把这个函数重构一下，提取个 helper。 Assistant did it.
fixtures.candidate: the refactor extracted a helper function.
fixtures.note: pure task execution, zero rule signal → skip

fixtures.context: User: 在本项目，sediment 主会话只读不写 memory，这是 ADR 0024 定的死约束，必须始终遵守。
fixtures.candidate: anti-pattern: main session must not write memory (sediment's job).
fixtures.note: project-specific (本项目/sediment) but always-tier intent (死约束/始终, anti-pattern, high-cost) → always/project

fixtures.context: User: 顺便记一下，这个 bug 是因为 escape-time 设太低导致 Ctrl+B 失效。
fixtures.candidate: fact: low escape-time breaks Ctrl+B prefix.
fixtures.note: diagnostic fact to retrieve when relevant, not a behavioral rule → knowledge zone
